target_notes: Apple Inc. — CIK 0000320193, EIN 94-2404110, ticker AAPL on Nasdaq. SIC 3571 = 'Electronic Computers' (BLS classification). Incorporated in California. Captured the entity-level submissions index (data.sec.gov/submissions/) plus the index.json for the FY2025 10-K (accession 0000320193-25-000079, filed 2025-10-31, primary document aapl-20250927.htm — fiscal year ending 2025-09-27).
capture_method: GET data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK0000320193.json (165 KB) for the company-level filing-history record. Then GET www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/320193/000032019325000079/index.json (9 KB) for the latest 10-K's filing-document directory listing. Both endpoints are no-auth public; SEC requires a real User-Agent string per https://www.sec.gov/os/accessing-edgar-data. No XBRL or 10-K HTML body persisted in v0; case_002 may add the primary document.
